questionText: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q1][medium] Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT "Date"."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
       SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS "total_cost",
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount" - "Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
       (SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount" - "Sales"."Total Product Cost") / SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS "gross_margin_pct",
       COUNT("Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS "total_order_lines"
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey"
GROUP BY "Date"."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY "Date"."Fiscal Year" ASC;

questionText: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q2][hard] Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    "Channel",
    SUM("Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    (SUM("Sales Amount") / (SELECT SUM("Sales Amount") FROM "Sales_Order" JOIN "Sales" ON "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey")) * 100 AS revenue_share_pct,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "Sales Order") AS total_orders,
    COUNT("Sales Order Line") AS order_lines,
    AVG("Sales Amount") AS avg_line_amount,
    ((SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct
FROM
    "Sales_Order"
    JOIN "Sales" ON "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey"
WHERE
    "Channel" IN ('Reseller', 'Internet')
GROUP BY
    "Channel"
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC;

questionText: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q3][hard] Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

payload.text:
SELECT "Category",
       SUM("Sales Amount") AS revenue,
       (SUM("Sales Amount") / (SELECT SUM("Sales Amount") FROM "Sales")) * 100 AS revenue_share_pct,
       SUM("Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
       SUM("Sales Amount" - "Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
       (SUM("Sales Amount" - "Total Product Cost") / SUM("Sales Amount")) * 100 AS gross_margin_pct
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "Category"
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

questionText: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

payload.text:
SELECT "Product"."Product", "Product"."Category", "Product"."Subcategory", 
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS revenue, 
       SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS units_sold, 
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount" - "Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit, 
       (SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount" - "Sales"."Total Product Cost") / SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "Product"."Product", "Product"."Category", "Product"."Subcategory"
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;

payload.text:
SELECT "Sales_Territory"."Group", "Sales_Territory"."Country", "Sales_Territory"."Region", "Date"."Fiscal Year", SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") as revenue, SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") as units_sold
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Sales_Territory" ON "Sales"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "Sales_Territory"."SalesTerritoryKey"
JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey"
GROUP BY "Sales_Territory"."Group", "Sales_Territory"."Country", "Sales_Territory"."Region", "Date"."Fiscal Year"

questionText: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
questionLabel: [Q6][hard] List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.

payload.text:
SELECT "Customer"."Customer", "Customer"."City", "Customer"."State-Province", "Customer"."Country-Region", 
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_orders, 
       COUNT("Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey") AS total_line_items, 
       SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS total_units, 
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS lifetime_revenue, 
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount" - "Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS lifetime_profit
FROM "Customer"
JOIN "Sales" ON "Customer"."CustomerKey" = "Sales"."CustomerKey"
WHERE "Customer"."CustomerKey" != -1
GROUP BY "Customer"."Customer", "Customer"."City", "Customer"."State-Province", "Customer"."Country-Region"
ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC
LIMIT 15;

questionText: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q7][hard] For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

payload.text:
SELECT "Business Type",
       COUNT(DISTINCT "ResellerKey") AS reseller_count,
       SUM("Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
       SUM("Sales Amount") / COUNT(DISTINCT "ResellerKey") AS revenue_per_reseller,
       SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
       (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Reseller" ON "Sales"."ResellerKey" = "Reseller"."ResellerKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
WHERE "Channel" = 'Reseller'
GROUP BY "Business Type"
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

questionText: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q7][hard] For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

payload.text:
SELECT "Business Type",
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Reseller"."ResellerKey") AS reseller_count,
       SUM("Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
       SUM("Sales Amount") / COUNT(DISTINCT "Reseller"."ResellerKey") AS revenue_per_reseller,
       SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
       (SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Reseller" ON "Sales"."ResellerKey" = "Reseller"."ResellerKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
WHERE "Channel" = 'Reseller'
GROUP BY "Business Type"
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

questionText: Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.
questionLabel: [Q8][hard] Show monthly revenue, number of distinct sales orders, and units sold for each month. Return columns: Month, MonthKey, monthly_revenue, orders, units_sold. Sort by MonthKey ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT "Date"."Month", "Date"."MonthKey", 
       SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS monthly_revenue, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT "Sales_Order"."Sales Order") AS orders, 
       SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS units_sold
FROM "Sales"
JOIN "Date" ON "Sales"."OrderDateKey" = "Date"."DateKey"
JOIN "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
GROUP BY "Date"."Month", "Date"."MonthKey"
ORDER BY "Date"."MonthKey" ASC;

payload.text:
SELECT 
    p."Subcategory",
    COUNT(s."SalesOrderLineKey") AS order_lines,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") / SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG(p."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
    "Sales" s
JOIN 
    "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
    p."Subcategory"
ORDER BY 
    revenue DESC;

questionText: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_year",
    "prior_revenue",
    "current_year",
    "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "yoy_growth_pct"
FROM (
    SELECT
        "so"."Channel",
        "p"."Category",
        "d1"."Fiscal Year" AS "prior_year",
        SUM("s1"."Sales Amount") AS "prior_revenue",
        "d2"."Fiscal Year" AS "current_year",
        SUM("s2"."Sales Amount") AS "current_revenue"
    FROM
        "Sales" "s1"
        JOIN "Sales" "s2" ON "s1"."CustomerKey" = "s2"."CustomerKey"
        JOIN "Date" "d1" ON "s1"."OrderDateKey" = "d1"."DateKey"
        JOIN "Date" "d2" ON "s2"."OrderDateKey" = "d2"."DateKey"
        JOIN "Product" "p" ON "s1"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Order" "so" ON "s1"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    WHERE
        "d1"."Fiscal Year" = "d2"."Fiscal Year" - 1
    GROUP BY
        "so"."Channel",
        "p"."Category",
        "d1"."Fiscal Year",
        "d2"."Fiscal Year"
) "yoy_growth"
ORDER BY
    "Channel" ASC,
    "Category" ASC,
    "prior_year" ASC;

    "Category",
    "prior_year",
    "prior_revenue",
    "current_year",

questionText: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_year",
    "prior_revenue",
    "current_year",
    "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "yoy_growth_pct"
FROM (
    SELECT
        "so"."Channel",
        "p"."Category",
        "d1"."Fiscal Year" AS "prior_year",
        SUM("s1"."Sales Amount") AS "prior_revenue",
        "d2"."Fiscal Year" AS "current_year",
        SUM("s2"."Sales Amount") AS "current_revenue"
    FROM
        "Sales" "s1"
        JOIN "Sales" "s2" ON "s1"."CustomerKey" = "s2"."CustomerKey"
        JOIN "Date" "d1" ON "s1"."OrderDateKey" = "d1"."DateKey"
        JOIN "Date" "d2" ON "s2"."OrderDateKey" = "d2"."DateKey"
        JOIN "Product" "p" ON "s1"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Order" "so" ON "s1"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    WHERE
        CAST("d1"."Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) = CAST("d2"."Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) - 1
    GROUP BY
        "so"."Channel",
        "p"."Category",
        "d1"."Fiscal Year",
        "d2"."Fiscal Year"
) "yoy_growth"
ORDER BY
    "Channel" ASC,
    "Category" ASC,
    "prior_year" ASC;

questionText: Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_year",
    "prior_revenue",
    "current_year",
    "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "yoy_growth_pct"
FROM (
    SELECT
        "so"."Channel",
        "p"."Category",
        "d1"."Fiscal Year" AS "prior_year",
        SUM("s1"."Sales Amount") AS "prior_revenue",
        "d2"."Fiscal Year" AS "current_year",
        SUM("s2"."Sales Amount") AS "current_revenue"
    FROM
        "Sales" "s1"
        JOIN "Sales" "s2" ON "s1"."CustomerKey" = "s2"."CustomerKey"
        JOIN "Date" "d1" ON "s1"."OrderDateKey" = "d1"."DateKey"
        JOIN "Date" "d2" ON "s2"."OrderDateKey" = "d2"."DateKey"
        JOIN "Product" "p" ON "s1"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Order" "so" ON "s1"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    WHERE
        CAST(SUBSTRING("d1"."Fiscal Year", 3) AS INTEGER) = CAST(SUBSTRING("d2"."Fiscal Year", 3) AS INTEGER) - 1
    GROUP BY
        "so"."Channel",
        "p"."Category",
        "d1"."Fiscal Year",
        "d2"."Fiscal Year"
) "yoy_growth"
ORDER BY
    "Channel" ASC,
    "Category" ASC,
    "prior_year" ASC;

questionText: Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.
questionLabel: [Q11][easy] Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.

payload.text:
SELECT "Category", COUNT(*) AS product_count, AVG("List Price") AS avg_list_price, MIN("List Price") AS min_list_price, MAX("List Price") AS max_list_price
FROM "Product"
GROUP BY "Category"
ORDER BY product_count DESC;

ORDER BY reseller_count DESC;

questionText: Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.
questionLabel: [Q21][hard] Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

payload.text:
SELECT 
    "Sales_Order"."Channel",
    "Product"."Category",
    SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") AS total_revenue,
    SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
    SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") / SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG("Product"."List Price") AS avg_list_price,
    (1 - (SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") / (SUM("Sales"."Order Quantity") * AVG("Product"."List Price")))) * 100 AS realized_discount_pct,
    SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") - SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit,
    ((SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount") - SUM("Sales"."Total Product Cost")) / SUM("Sales"."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM 
    "Sales"
JOIN 
    "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
JOIN 
    "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY 
    "Sales_Order"."Channel", "Product"."Category"
ORDER BY 
    "Sales_Order"."Channel" ASC, total_revenue DESC;

questionText: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q22][hard] Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT 
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_quarter" AS "prior_quarter",
    "prior_revenue" AS "prior_revenue",
    "current_quarter" AS "current_quarter",
    "current_revenue" AS "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "qoq_growth_pct"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        s1."Channel",
        p1."Category",
        d1."Fiscal Quarter" AS "prior_quarter",
        SUM(s1."Sales Amount") AS "prior_revenue",
        d2."Fiscal Quarter" AS "current_quarter",
        SUM(s2."Sales Amount") AS "current_revenue"
    FROM "Sales" s1
    JOIN "Sales" s2 ON s1."CustomerKey" = s2."CustomerKey" AND s1."ProductKey" = s2."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Product" p1 ON s1."ProductKey" = p1."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d1 ON s1."OrderDateKey" = d1."DateKey"
    JOIN "Date" d2 ON s2."OrderDateKey" = d2."DateKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so1 ON s1."SalesOrderLineKey" = so1."SalesOrderLineKey"
    WHERE d1."Fiscal Quarter" = d2."Fiscal Quarter" - 1
    GROUP BY s1."Channel", p1."Category", d1."Fiscal Quarter", d2."Fiscal Quarter"
) subquery
ORDER BY "Channel" ASC, "Category" ASC, "prior_quarter" ASC;

    "current_revenue" AS "current_revenue",

questionText: Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q22][hard] Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT 
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_quarter" AS "prior_quarter",
    "prior_revenue" AS "prior_revenue",
    "current_quarter" AS "current_quarter",
    "current_revenue" AS "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "qoq_growth_pct"
FROM (
    SELECT 
        so1."Channel",
        p1."Category",
        d1."Fiscal Quarter" AS "prior_quarter",
        SUM(s1."Sales Amount") AS "prior_revenue",
        d2."Fiscal Quarter" AS "current_quarter",
        SUM(s2."Sales Amount") AS "current_revenue"
    FROM "Sales" s1
    JOIN "Sales" s2 ON s1."CustomerKey" = s2."CustomerKey" AND s1."ProductKey" = s2."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Product" p1 ON s1."ProductKey" = p1."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d1 ON s1."OrderDateKey" = d1."DateKey"
    JOIN "Date" d2 ON s2."OrderDateKey" = d2."DateKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so1 ON s1."SalesOrderLineKey" = so1."SalesOrderLineKey"
    WHERE CAST(d1."Fiscal Quarter" AS INTEGER) = CAST(d2."Fiscal Quarter" AS INTEGER) - 1
    GROUP BY so1."Channel", p1."Category", d1."Fiscal Quarter", d2."Fiscal Quarter"
) subquery
ORDER BY "Channel" ASC, "Category" ASC, "prior_quarter" ASC;

questionText: For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.
questionLabel: [Q23][hard] For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. Return columns: Category, revenue_rank, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, category_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Category, revenue_rank, then Subcategory all ascending.

payload.text:
WITH subcategory_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    p."Category",
    p."Subcategory",
    SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
    SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
    SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
  FROM
    "Sales" s
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
  GROUP BY
    p."Category",
    p."Subcategory"
),
subcategory_ranks AS (
  SELECT
    "Category",
    "Subcategory",
    revenue,
    units_sold,
    gross_profit,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "Category" ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
  FROM
    subcategory_revenue
),
category_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    "Category",
    SUM(revenue) AS total_category_revenue
  FROM
    subcategory_revenue
  GROUP BY
    "Category"
)
SELECT
  sr."Category",
  sr.revenue_rank,
  sr."Subcategory",
  sr.revenue,
  sr.units_sold,
  sr.gross_profit,
  (sr.revenue / cr.total_category_revenue) * 100 AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM
  subcategory_ranks sr
  JOIN category_revenue cr ON sr."Category" = cr."Category"
WHERE
  sr.revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY
  sr."Category" ASC,
  sr.revenue_rank ASC,
  sr."Subcategory" ASC;

    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "Category" ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank
  FROM
    subcategory_revenue
),
category_revenue AS (
  SELECT
    "Category",
    SUM(revenue) AS total_category_revenue
  FROM
    subcategory_revenue
  GROUP BY
    "Category"
)
SELECT
  sr."Category",
  sr.revenue_rank,
  sr."Subcategory",
  sr.revenue,
  sr.units_sold,
  sr.gross_profit,
  (sr.revenue / cr.total_category_revenue) * 100 AS category_revenue_share_pct
FROM
  subcategory_ranks sr
  JOIN category_revenue cr ON sr."Category" = cr."Category"
WHERE
  sr.revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY
  sr."Category" ASC,
  sr.revenue_rank ASC,
  sr."Subcategory" ASC;

questionText: Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.
questionLabel: [Q24][hard] Within each sales channel, show revenue, revenue share percentage, cumulative revenue share percentage ordered by revenue descending, number of distinct sales orders, and gross profit by product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct, cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct, orders, gross_profit. Sort by Channel ascending, then revenue descending, then Category ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    SUM("Sales Amount") AS revenue,
    ROUND(SUM("Sales Amount") / SUM(SUM("Sales Amount")) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel") * 100, 2) AS channel_revenue_share_pct,
    ROUND(SUM(SUM("Sales Amount")) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel" ORDER BY SUM("Sales Amount") DESC, "Category" ASC) / SUM(SUM("Sales Amount")) OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel") * 100, 2) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,
    COUNT(DISTINCT "Sales Order") AS orders,
    SUM("Sales Amount") - SUM("Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
FROM
    "Sales"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" ON "Sales"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "Sales_Order"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" ON "Sales"."ProductKey" = "Product"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY
    "Channel",
    "Category"
ORDER BY
    "Channel" ASC,
    revenue DESC,
    "Category" ASC;

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    ST."Group" AS "Group",
    D."Fiscal Year" AS "Fiscal Year",
    top_channel_data."Channel" AS top_channel,
    top_channel_data.channel_revenue,
    group_year_data.group_year_revenue,
    (top_channel_data.channel_revenue / group_year_data.group_year_revenue) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM
    (SELECT
        ST1."Group",
        D1."Fiscal Year",
        SO1."Channel",
        SUM(S1."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
    FROM
        "Sales" S1
        JOIN "Sales_Order" SO1 ON S1."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO1."SalesOrderLineKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST1 ON S1."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST1."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" D1 ON S1."OrderDateKey" = D1."DateKey"
    GROUP BY
        ST1."Group",
        D1."Fiscal Year",
        SO1."Channel") AS top_channel_data
    JOIN
    (SELECT
        ST2."Group",
        D2."Fiscal Year",
        SUM(S2."Sales Amount") AS group_year_revenue
    FROM
        "Sales" S2
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST2 ON S2."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST2."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" D2 ON S2."OrderDateKey" = D2."DateKey"
    GROUP BY
        ST2."Group",
        D2."Fiscal Year") AS group_year_data ON top_channel_data."Group" = group_year_data."Group" AND top_channel_data."Fiscal Year" = group_year_data."Fiscal Year"
WHERE
    top_channel_data.channel_revenue = (
        SELECT
            MAX(channel_revenue)
        FROM
            (SELECT
                ST3."Group",
                D3."Fiscal Year",
                SO3."Channel",
                SUM(S3."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
            FROM
                "Sales" S3
                JOIN "Sales_Order" SO3 ON S3."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO3."SalesOrderLineKey"
                JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST3 ON S3."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST3."SalesTerritoryKey"
                JOIN "Date" D3 ON S3."OrderDateKey" = D3."DateKey"
            GROUP BY
                ST3."Group",
                D3."Fiscal Year",
                SO3."Channel") AS inner_data
        WHERE
            inner_data."Group" = top_channel_data."Group" AND inner_data."Fiscal Year" = top_channel_data."Fiscal Year"
    )
ORDER BY
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year" ASC;

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    group_year_data."Group",
    group_year_data."Fiscal Year",
    top_channel_data."Channel" AS top_channel,
    top_channel_data.channel_revenue,
    group_year_data.group_year_revenue,
    (top_channel_data.channel_revenue / group_year_data.group_year_revenue) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM
    (SELECT
        ST1."Group",
        D1."Fiscal Year",
        SO1."Channel",
        SUM(S1."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
    FROM
        "Sales" S1
        JOIN "Sales_Order" SO1 ON S1."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO1."SalesOrderLineKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST1 ON S1."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST1."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" D1 ON S1."OrderDateKey" = D1."DateKey"
    GROUP BY
        ST1."Group",
        D1."Fiscal Year",
        SO1."Channel") AS top_channel_data
    JOIN
    (SELECT
        ST2."Group",
        D2."Fiscal Year",
        SUM(S2."Sales Amount") AS group_year_revenue
    FROM
        "Sales" S2
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST2 ON S2."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST2."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" D2 ON S2."OrderDateKey" = D2."DateKey"
    GROUP BY
        ST2."Group",
        D2."Fiscal Year") AS group_year_data ON top_channel_data."Group" = group_year_data."Group" AND top_channel_data."Fiscal Year" = group_year_data."Fiscal Year"
WHERE
    top_channel_data.channel_revenue = (
        SELECT
            MAX(channel_revenue)
        FROM
            (SELECT
                ST3."Group",
                D3."Fiscal Year",
                SO3."Channel",
                SUM(S3."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
            FROM
                "Sales" S3
                JOIN "Sales_Order" SO3 ON S3."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO3."SalesOrderLineKey"
                JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST3 ON S3."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST3."SalesTerritoryKey"
                JOIN "Date" D3 ON S3."OrderDateKey" = D3."DateKey"
            GROUP BY
                ST3."Group",
                D3."Fiscal Year",
                SO3."Channel") AS inner_data
        WHERE
            inner_data."Group" = top_channel_data."Group" AND inner_data."Fiscal Year" = top_channel_data."Fiscal Year"
    )
ORDER BY
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year" ASC;

questionText: For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

payload.text:
SELECT
    group_year_data."Group",
    group_year_data."Fiscal Year",
    top_channel_data."Channel" AS top_channel,
    top_channel_data.channel_revenue,
    group_year_data.group_year_revenue,
    (top_channel_data.channel_revenue / group_year_data.group_year_revenue) * 100 AS channel_revenue_share_pct
FROM
    (SELECT
        ST1."Group",
        D1."Fiscal Year",
        SO1."Channel",
        SUM(S1."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
    FROM
        "Sales" S1
        JOIN "Sales_Order" SO1 ON S1."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO1."SalesOrderLineKey"
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST1 ON S1."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST1."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" D1 ON S1."OrderDateKey" = D1."DateKey"
    GROUP BY
        ST1."Group",
        D1."Fiscal Year",
        SO1."Channel") AS top_channel_data
    JOIN
    (SELECT
        ST2."Group",
        D2."Fiscal Year",
        SUM(S2."Sales Amount") AS group_year_revenue
    FROM
        "Sales" S2
        JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST2 ON S2."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST2."SalesTerritoryKey"
        JOIN "Date" D2 ON S2."OrderDateKey" = D2."DateKey"
    GROUP BY
        ST2."Group",
        D2."Fiscal Year") AS group_year_data ON top_channel_data."Group" = group_year_data."Group" AND top_channel_data."Fiscal Year" = group_year_data."Fiscal Year"
WHERE
    top_channel_data.channel_revenue = (
        SELECT
            MAX(channel_revenue)
        FROM
            (SELECT
                ST3."Group",
                D3."Fiscal Year",
                SO3."Channel",
                SUM(S3."Sales Amount") AS channel_revenue
            FROM
                "Sales" S3
                JOIN "Sales_Order" SO3 ON S3."SalesOrderLineKey" = SO3."SalesOrderLineKey"
                JOIN "Sales_Territory" ST3 ON S3."SalesTerritoryKey" = ST3."SalesTerritoryKey"
                JOIN "Date" D3 ON S3."OrderDateKey" = D3."DateKey"
            GROUP BY
                ST3."Group",
                D3."Fiscal Year",
                SO3."Channel") AS inner_data
        WHERE
            inner_data."Group" = top_channel_data."Group" AND inner_data."Fiscal Year" = top_channel_data."Fiscal Year"
    )
ORDER BY
    group_year_data."Group",
    group_year_data."Fiscal Year" ASC;
